name: Piano Glow
short_description: Piano in online multiplayer lobbies, with leaderboards, gamified training modes (ear, sheet, rhythm and falling notes). Play any song using either a QWERTY computer/laptop keyboard or a piano.
detailed_description:
PianoGlow is a piano game featuring:

  • Multiplayer

    • Show-off your piano skills & listen to others around the globe.

    • Queue-based mode to take turns playing piano.

    • In-game currency, earned via daily rewards, quests and tipping other players.

    • Global and private chatrooms.

  • Works with both QWERTY keyboard or a real digital piano

    • Play any music or song with a QWERTY keyboard (laptop/computer).

    • Or connect to a real digital piano via USB-B.

    • Velocity integration with Wooting Analog QWERTY keyboards so that you can play with dynamics on the computer keyboard (loud & soft).

    • Record & load MIDI files (live play or render as video from within the app).

  • Training modes

    • Ear training, rhythm, falling notes & sheet music game modes.

    • Tracks stats and shows wrong answers more often to focus on your weaknesses. Unlock achievements!

    • A detailed calendar that shows exactly how much you practiced each day.

    • AI-based fingering, help determine which fingers to use on any MIDI file or song.

    • AI-based converter that adjusts any MIDI or song into a smaller piano/keyboard.

    • Interactive Circle-of-Fifths cheat sheet - clicking shows the common chord triads, key signature and the 7th chords.

    • Automated Chord Name Identifier & Intervals when you play any chord on the piano.

  • Customizable themes

    • Stunning visuals & particle effects that move in sync with the tempo of your playing.

    • Upload video files as the background.

  • QWERTY features

    • Direct integration of vp-sheets.arijan.dev (library of 40,000 QWERTY songs) within the app and shares the same controls as most other virtual piano games.

    • Auto-play QWERTY sheet music (semi-auto included).

    • Typing game modes, where falling notes (and sheet music based notation) are also shown with QWERTY notes.

  • Customizable Audio

    • Customizable reverb & equalizer audio effects.

    • Upload custom SoundFont (.sf2, .sf3) files!

    • Load multiple SoundFonts simultaneously (e.g. one for left-hand vs right-hand).

    • Create your own SoundFonts!

  • Community

    • Discord community server, chat and share tips about piano.

    • Dedicated website and regular social media content.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic*, Indonesian*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Bangla*, Hindi*
*languages with full audio support
